default_title: DynoPay — Cryptocurrency Payment Gateway for Businesses
default_desc: DynoPay is a cryptocurrency payment gateway that lets merchants accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins with instant settlement in USDT or USDC. Low fees, easy API integration.
home_title: DynoPay — Crypto Payment Gateway | Accept Bitcoin & Settle in Stablecoins
home_desc: Accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, and 20+ cryptocurrencies with automatic conversion to USDT or USDC. DynoPay is the crypto payment gateway built for merchants who want stablecoin settlement, low fees, and a simple API.
fees_title: Crypto Payment Processing Fees — Transparent Pricing | DynoPay
fees_desc: See DynoPay's crypto payment gateway fees — no hidden charges, no monthly costs. Compare our low transaction fees for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoin payments.
documentation_title: API Documentation — Integrate Crypto Payments | DynoPay
documentation_desc: Integrate cryptocurrency payments into your website or app with the DynoPay REST API. Webhooks, payment links, Bitcoin & Ethereum checkout — full developer docs.
systemStatus_title: System Status — API & Payment Uptime | DynoPay
systemStatus_desc: Real-time operational status of DynoPay payment processing, API gateway, wallet services, and webhook delivery.
termsConditions_title: Terms & Conditions | DynoPay Crypto Payment Gateway
termsConditions_desc: Terms and conditions for using the DynoPay cryptocurrency payment gateway and merchant services.
privacyPolicy_title: Privacy Policy | DynoPay Crypto Payment Gateway
privacyPolicy_desc: How DynoPay collects, uses, and protects your personal data as a cryptocurrency payment provider.
amlPolicy_desc: DynoPay's Anti-Money Laundering (AML) compliance policy for cryptocurrency payment processing and merchant onboarding.
authLogin_desc: Sign in to your DynoPay merchant dashboard to manage crypto payments, transactions, and wallets.
authRegister_desc: Register a free DynoPay merchant account and start accepting cryptocurrency payments in minutes.
resetPassword_desc: Reset your DynoPay merchant account password securely.
dashboard_desc: Overview of your cryptocurrency payment activity — volume, transactions, and wallet balances.
transactions_desc: View and manage all your Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoin payment transactions.
payLinks_desc: Create and manage shareable cryptocurrency payment links — no coding required.
editPayLink_desc: Edit your crypto payment link amount, currency, and settings.
createPayLink_desc: Generate a new cryptocurrency payment link to accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, or stablecoin payments.
wallet_desc: Manage your Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, USDT, and USDC wallet addresses.
customers_desc: View and manage your customer records and payment history.
developerKeys_desc: Manage your DynoPay API keys for cryptocurrency payment integration.
invoices_desc: Generate tax-compliant cryptocurrency invoices and export transaction reports.
company_desc: Manage your company profile, payment preferences, and settlement options.
profile_desc: Manage your DynoPay merchant account profile and security settings.
notifications_desc: Your latest payment alerts, transaction updates, and account notifications.
referrals_desc: Invite other merchants to DynoPay and earn rewards on their transaction volume.
settings_desc: Configure your DynoPay account preferences, webhooks, and auto-conversion settings.
helpSupport_title: Help & Support | DynoPay Crypto Payment Gateway
helpSupport_desc: Get help with DynoPay integration, payment issues, wallet setup, and API troubleshooting.
helpArticle_desc: DynoPay knowledge base — guides for crypto payment integration and merchant account setup.
pay_desc: Complete your cryptocurrency payment securely via the DynoPay checkout.
payDemo_title: Checkout Demo — Try Crypto Payments | DynoPay
payDemo_desc: See how the DynoPay crypto checkout works — live demo of Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoin payments.
payAmlPolicy_desc: Anti-Money Laundering policy for cryptocurrency payments processed through DynoPay checkout.
payTermsOfService_desc: Terms of service for crypto payments processed through the DynoPay checkout.
paymentStatesDemo_desc: Demo of DynoPay cryptocurrency payment state transitions and confirmation flow.
paySuccessDemo_desc: Demo of the DynoPay successful crypto payment confirmation flow.
payment_desc: Your cryptocurrency payment is being processed and confirmed on the blockchain.
paymentSuccess_desc: Your cryptocurrency payment has been confirmed on the blockchain and settled successfully.
paymentFailed_desc: Your cryptocurrency payment could not be processed. Please try again or contact support.
paymentVerify_desc: Verifying your cryptocurrency payment on the blockchain — waiting for network confirmations.
admin_desc: DynoPay platform administration and merchant management.
adminLogin_desc: Sign in to the DynoPay administration panel.
adminFee_desc: Manage cryptocurrency payment processing fee tiers and merchant settings.
adminWallet_desc: Configure platform wallet addresses and blockchain settlement options.
adminTransferSpeed_desc: Configure blockchain transfer speed and gas settings for payment processing.
adminProfile_desc: Manage your DynoPay admin account profile.
